name: Brownies
recipeIngredient: 2 Cups Walnuts or Pecans, coarsely broken
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter the bottom and sides of two 8x8-inch square pans (not the same if using 9x13).
2. In a large bowl, stir together butter, granulated sugar, light brown sugar, and dark corn syrup.
3. Stir in the eggs one at a time until blended.
4. Melt chocolate in a small saucepan and stir into the sugar mixture.
5. Add almond extract, then flour, stirring until smooth.
6. Mix in the walnuts or pecans until evenly distributed.
7. Pour batter evenly into prepared pans.
8. Bake at 350°F for about 40 minutes.
9. Let cool on a wire rack before refrigerating uncovered until cooled completely.
10. Cut into bars and enjoy.
